message:
fix(browser): validate requestedLane field in service-worker broker descriptor and handoff parsers

parseBrowserServiceWorkerBrokerDescriptor and
parseBrowserServiceWorkerBrokerHandoffRecord previously accepted any
object with the right field shapes, without checking that requestedLane
matched BROWSER_SERVICE_WORKER_BROKER_LANE. A descriptor or handoff
record produced by a foreign lane (or a corrupted storage entry) would
pass validation and be treated as a legitimate broker record.

Add candidate.requestedLane !== BROWSER_SERVICE_WORKER_BROKER_LANE as the
first guard in both parsers, so foreign-lane records are rejected before
field inspection begins.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
